creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Marten Vijn <info@martenvijn.nl> -----

From: Marten Vijn <info@martenvijn.nl>
To: freebsd-current@freebsd.org
Subject: some help wished on pr 135961

Yesterday I had a chat session with gavin (#bugbusters)

There seems to be a problem with the boot0 loader
with pcengines boards from CF-card:
- WRAP 1C
- WRAP 2E
- ALIX 1C
(- maybe Soekris NET4826)

The failiure occurs just before or after 

STARTING BTX loader


help wished:
- help to create verbose (debugging) loader (boot0) 
- new debug strategies?
- create fixes.
- If you live in Leiden, the Netherlands, maybe hands-on hacking.  

possible related issues:
- failing boot0cfg -s (only works on -s1 setting -s2|3|4 boots s1
- slow  /failing PXEboot

thanks,
Marten  

-- 
Marten Vijn
linux 2.0.18 OpenBSD 3.6 FreeBSD 4.6
http://martenvijn.nl
http://opencommunitycamp.org
http://wifisoft.org

----- End forwarded message -----
